items.title: Pogacar gifts Tour de France stage to teammate
items.summary: Defending champion Tadej Pogacar gifted victory to his teammate Isaac del Toro on the second stage of the Tour de France while Jonas Vingegaard retained the overall lead.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: How phenom Alex Eala can continue to win at Wimble...
items.summary: After her shocking upset of defending Wimbledon champ Iga Swiatek, can Alex Eala keep advancing? Yes, and here's why.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Australia take another stroll through T20 World Cup final against frustrated England
items.summary: Austraila 153-3, England 150-4; Australia win by seven wickets Mooney strikes half-century for third final in a row Well, it was fun while it lasted. Eight months is the time pe...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
